**Acceptance Criteria**
No blocking findings. `QueryCondition::State` and `Priority` are typed at [parser.rs:27](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/query_engine/parser.rs:27), invalid state/priority values return typed parse errors at [parser.rs:187](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/query_engine/parser.rs:187), and regression tests cover both invalid `state:` and `priority:` values at [parser.rs:260](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/query_engine/parser.rs:260) and [mod.rs:125](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/query_engine/mod.rs:125).

`FilterField` is a closed enum parsed in the lexer at [lexer.rs:29](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/query_engine/lexer.rs:29), and the parser match is exhaustive with no string fallback at [parser.rs:137](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/query_engine/parser.rs:137).

`StatePredicate` stores `BTreeSet<State>` at [rules.rs:486](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs:486), parses through its whitelist at [rules.rs:433](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs:433), validates authored tokens at [rules.rs:587](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs:587), and `matches()` is a direct set lookup at [rules.rs:573](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs:573).

**Architecture**
No boundary violations found. Query parsing/evaluation remains in `query_engine`, domain enums remain in `domain`, validation rule selection remains in `validation/rules.rs`, and there is no new storage or CLI/output coupling in the changed paths.

**Functional Paradigm**
No blocking issues. The changes use direct typed matching and iterator-based set construction at [rules.rs:523](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs:523). Existing parser state mutation is localized parser machinery.

**Correctness And Invariants**
No blocking issues. The previous `from_str(...).unwrap_or(false)` fail-open evaluator path is removed; evaluator comparisons are now typed at [evaluator.rs:43](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/query_engine/evaluator.rs:43). This change does not add file writes, event mutations, gate transitions, assignee/label validation paths, or PID handling.

**Safety**
No unsafe code found in the reviewed changes. No PID-related code was introduced.

**Testing**
Accepted based on recorded issue evidence: `cargo-ci` passed at `2026-06-26T14:51:49Z`; I did not rerun tests because the issue has a succeeded cargo-ci gate. I ran `./scripts/jit-validate.sh`, which passed. Regression tests exist for invalid query values and typed state predicate behavior.

**Error Handling**
No blocking issues. Query lexer/parser errors use `thiserror` via `QueryParseError` at [error.rs:32](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/query_engine/error.rs:32), and invalid values include the offending token plus valid values at [error.rs:54](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/query_engine/error.rs:54).

**CLI Contract**
No CLI command surface was changed. Existing `QueryFilter::parse` still returns `Result` and propagates typed parse failures through the prior call path at [mod.rs:62](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-44450437/crates/jit/src/query_engine/mod.rs:62).

**Documentation**
No blocking issues. New public `FilterField`, `QueryParseError`, and `StatePredicate` APIs include doc comments and examples.

**Jit Issue Management**
`issue.dependencies` is empty. `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed. `run_history` is empty, so there is no prior review feedback to verify.
